news.headline: Auto stocks hit hard by Trump tariffs, Dow Jones rebounds after falling more than 300 points, live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Following the announcement of new tariffs by President Trump, the stock market experienced a downturn initially today. Auto stocks were significantly impacted by the news, facing a substantial decline. However, buyers entered the market later in the day which led to a rebound in the Dow Jones index after it had dropped more than 300 points. The volatility in the market was a direct result of the tariff news, but the Dow Jones managed to recover with the resurgence of buyers.

news.headline: Large-scale storage systems drive energy market growth in Europe; market expected to expand by 30-40% annually.
news.summary: In Munich and Pforzheim, Germany, the energy transition has reached a critical juncture. As electricity generation from renewable sources continues to rise, the demand for efficient grid stabilization solutions is increasing. Large-scale battery storage systems are becoming crucial in this landscape. SolarPower Europe projects a 30–40% annual growth in the European market, primarily fueled by the expansion of large-scale storage solutions. These systems will be a focal point at ees Europe, the largest trade fair on the continent, highlighting the industry's advancements.

news.headline: Cintas exceeds Q3 earnings expectations, raises FY25 revenue outlook to $10.28-10.305 billion. Stocks surge.
news.summary: Cintas Corporation (NASDAQ:CTAS) exceeded expectations in their third-quarter earnings report by posting earnings of $1.13 per share, surpassing the estimated $1.06 per share. Additionally, the company reported quarterly sales of $2.609 billion, beating the estimated $2.597 billion. Cintas has also raised its outlook for FY25, now expecting revenues between $10.28 billion and $10.305 billion, up from the prior forecast of $10.255 billion to $10.32 billion. This adjustment was partially due to a $15.0 million reduction at the top of the range.

news.headline: Moody's: Higher tariffs and tax cuts to boost deficits.
Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) has surged with traders eyeing it as the next big meme coin, potentially reaching a deca-billion valuation.
news.summary: Fartcoin (CRYPTO: FARTCOIN) has experienced significant growth in the last week, sparking speculation among traders about potential exchange listings and positioning it as a prominent meme coin. In a post dated March 27, crypto trader MaxBecauseBTC pointed out that the Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) meme coin Fartcoin is gaining traction in the market, attracting interest from both crypto enthusiasts and traditional financial players. Despite its meme-based roots, Fartcoin has the potential to achieve a valuation in the deca-billion range if its current momentum persists. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete story.

news.headline: Moody's edges closer to a US downgrade.
Pacific Defense chosen for US Army CMFF Program contract definition phase, pioneering CMOSS products.
news.summary: Pacific Defense, based in El Segundo, California, a prominent provider of C5ISR solutions, has been chosen to enter the contract definition phase for the US Army's CMFF MCI program. This initiative falls under the OTA contract evaluation and aims to establish the groundwork for contract activities, encouraging creativity and program efficacy following contract finalization. This development positions Pacific Defense as a key player in the program, showcasing their expertise in CMOSS technology.

news.headline: Exor CEO Elkann: US tariffs raise concerns on the affordability of cars made in America and have implications on demand in the US.
Nintendo Direct announces new Switch games and a smart device app "Nintendo Today!" in 2025. New titles like Rhythm Heaven Groove revealed.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, a recent Nintendo Direct presentation showcased upcoming content for the popular Nintendo Switch system in 2025 and beyond. Among the announcements was the introduction of the innovative Nintendo Today! app for smart devices. This app will offer a diverse range of content, including news and videos featuring beloved Nintendo games and characters from specific franchises. Additionally, new game titles set to launch on the Nintendo Switch were unveiled, including Rhythm Heaven Groove and Tomodachi. The event provided fans with a glimpse of the exciting developments to look forward to in the world of Nintendo gaming.

news.headline: AAR Corp (NYSE:AIR) set to release Q1 results, with analysts expecting earnings of 96 cents per share, up from 85 cents last year, and revenue of $699.13 million. AAR shares closed at $69.70.
news.summary: AAR Corp. (NYSE:AIR) is set to announce its first-quarter financial results on Thursday, March 27, after the market closes. Analysts are predicting quarterly earnings of 96 cents per share, an increase from 85 cents per share in the same period last year. The Wood Dale, Illinois-based company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $699.13 million, up from $567.3 million a year ago.Additionally, on March 19, AAR appointed Hema Widhani to its Board of Directors. The company's shares experienced a slight uptick of 0.1%, reaching a closing price of $69.70 on Wednesday.For more detailed insights and analyst ratings, interested readers can refer to the Benzinga Pro platform.

news.headline: SEC nominee chosen by Trump under close conflict of interest scrutiny, facing challenges.
BIC announces the release of its 2024 Universal Registration Document, now available to the public.
Bernstein sets $105 target for Robinhood; says investors underestimate platform value as Robinhood enhances Gold Membership.
news.summary: Bernstein analysts have highlighted the undervaluation of Robinhood's complete platform by investors. They believe that the value of Robinhood's platform is not fully recognized by investors.

news.headline: Connectivity Wireless raises $200 million from First Citizens Bank and Post Road Group for growth.
news.summary: Connectivity Wireless, a prominent provider of in-building wireless solutions, based in Boca Raton, Florida, has finalized a significant financial deal. The company secured a $110 million senior debt facility, with an extra $30 million potentially accessible in the future, facilitated by First Citizens Bank. Furthermore, Connectivity Wireless received a notable $60 million growth investment from Post Road Group and Boundary Street Capital. This move has significantly bolstered the company's financial standing, showcasing its growth and potential in the industry.

news.headline: GameStop sold $85 million in digital assets in 2022 and 2023 before its recent Bitcoin investment decision.
news.summary: Between the years 2022 and 2023, GameStop reported revenue of $85 million from the sale of digital assets, based on information disclosed in a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).

news.headline: European Auto Suppliers Association: The US decision to impose a 25% tariff on non-US passenger cars and light commercial vehicles is misguided and harmful for everyone, including the United States itself.
European Auto Suppliers Association calls on policymakers to prioritise finding solutions over trade barriers.

Crypto payment gateways allow businesses to accept crypto payments, converting to fiat if preferred. They offer lower fees and access to global customers, leveraging blockchain for secure and efficient transactions. Two types exist: custodial and non-custodial. Major banks and fintechs are entering the stablecoin market. Compared to traditional fiat gateways, crypto gateways process transactions quicker, are less vulnerable to chargebacks, decentralized, but can be more costly and subject to risks. Major exchanges like Binance, Coinbase, and Kraken offer their payment gateways. Merchants must consider security, fees, supported currencies, and customer support when selecting a gateway.
news.summary: The article discusses the importance of crypto payment gateways for businesses, explaining that they enable the acceptance of cryptocurrency payments and streamline the conversion process from digital assets to fiat currencies. These gateways help reduce transaction fees, offer access to a global customer base, and enhance security and transparency by leveraging blockchain technology. Two main types of crypto payment gateways are described: custodial and non-custodial. Custodial gateways hold payments temporarily, provide automated fiat conversion, and offer compliance features. Non-custodial gateways prioritize security and decentralization, providing merchants with full control over their funds. Major banks and fintechs are also entering the stablecoin market. The article compares fiat and crypto gateways, highlighting differences in currency type, decentralization, transaction speed, and chargeback protection. Pros and cons of cryptocurrency payment gateways are discussed, emphasizing quick settlements, minimal network fees, and added security, but also mentioning the risks of centralization, potential operational disruptions, and higher costs. Major crypto exchanges like Binance, Coinbase, and Kraken provide payment gateways with various features and fees. Security considerations, including transaction fees, supported cryptocurrencies, and customer support, are advised for merchants selecting a crypto payment gateway.

news.headline: Oportun confirms receipt of a notice from Findell nominating two directors for election to the Board at the 2025 Annual Meeting.
news.summary: San Carlos, California - On March 27, 2025, Oportun (Nasdaq: OPRT), a financial services company with a mission focus, announced receiving a notice from Findell Capital Management LLC ("Findell"). Findell has nominated two directors for election to Oportun's Board of Directors at the upcoming 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The Board released a statement in response to this development.

news.headline: Ripple settles with SEC for $50 million, may benefit from stablecoin rally. Experts divided on XRP's potential.
news.summary: Ripple (XRP) has recently reached an agreement in its legal case with the SEC by accepting a revised $50 million penalty, reduced from the original $125 million. Ripple's Chief Legal Officer mentioned that $75 million will be returned by the SEC pending final approvals. The agreement came after the SEC decided not to appeal a ruling that stated XRP retail sales were not violating securities laws, while institutional sales did. As part of the settlement, Ripple will withdraw its cross-appeal and the SEC will lift the current injunction. Industry experts are divided on whether XRP will benefit from the stablecoin rally following this regulatory clarity, some discussing potential XRP-based exchange-traded products.

news.headline: BBG Reporter on X: Senate Republican Leader Thune tells me they are putting pen to paper on the Senate Budget resolution.
Baltic Horizon Fund held an Extraordinary General Meeting on March 27, 2025 in Tallinn, Estonia for unit-holders and SDR holders.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, an Extraordinary General Meeting was held in Tallinn, Estonia for unit-holders and Swedish Depositary Receipt (SDR) holders of Baltic Horizon Fund. The meeting convened to discuss important matters concerning the Investors.

news.headline: Elon Musk benefits from Trump’s car tariffs as one of the few winners.
Inventor from Bullard, Texas creates new roofing product STEP SHIELD to prevent leaks, aims to make every roofer a pro.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, on March 27, 2025, an inventor from Bullard, Texas shared his inspiration behind creating the STEP SHIELD to enhance leak prevention at flashing and sidewalls in the roofing industry. The inventor aimed to make roofers more efficient with this design. The product is poised to revolutionize the sector.

news.headline: Bank of South Carolina Corporation (OTCQX: BKSC) declares $0.19 quarterly cash dividend, record date April 8, 2025.
news.summary: In Charleston, South Carolina on March 27, 2025, the Board of Directors of Bank of South Carolina Corporation, trading under OTCQX: BKSC, approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share for shareholders. The dividend will be payable to shareholders of record as of April 8, 2025.

news.headline: 10Bridge, a data interoperability subsidiary of 121G Consulting, achieves milestone with a large Accountable Care organization, enabling integrated growth.
news.summary: Carrollton, Georgia - 10Bridge, a subsidiary of 121G Consulting specialized in data interoperability, has reached a significant accomplishment with a leading Accountable Care management organization in the U.S. This achievement marks a major milestone for 10Bridge, facilitating its integrated growth within the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Global bearings market projected to reach USD 241.62 billion by 2033 with 4.9% CAGR. Growth driven by automotive, machinery, and aerospace sectors due to automation and manufacturing expansion.
news.summary: The bearings market on a global scale is witnessing significant growth, fueled by increasing demand in automotive, industrial machinery, and aerospace industries. Factors such as rising automation, expanding manufacturing operations, and increased investments in precision engineering are propelling the market forward. This growth is reflected in the market size, which has reached substantial figures in recent years.

news.headline: CENTURY 21 Real Estate unveils 2024 top system winners nationwide and globally, recognizing elite real estate professionals.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Madison, New Jersey, Century 21 Real Estate LLC, a subsidiary of Anywhere Real Estate Inc. (NYSE: HOUS), recognized top real estate professionals in the CENTURY 21® network for their outstanding performance in a dynamic industry. The event celebrated individuals who excelled in navigating market changes and achieving notable success in the real estate sector.

news.headline: Bolt and Netlify power 1 million AI-generated websites in 5 months, signaling AI-driven web development era. #NetlifyTopChoice
news.summary: In San Francisco on March 27, 2025, Netlify was announced as the top choice for deploying AI-generated websites. In partnership with Bolt, a remarkable achievement was marked with over 1 million AI-generated sites developed using Bolt and launched on Netlify within a span of five months, starting from November 2024. This signifies a significant trend towards the integration of artificial intelligence in creating websites, pointing towards a promising future for AI technology in the web development sector.

news.headline: AlgosOne.ai rejects acquisition offers up to $500M, declines bids from hedge funds, gearing up for AiAO Coin debut.
news.summary: AI trading platform AlgosOne.ai has rejected significant acquisition offers from well-known hedge funds as it prepares for the launch of AiAO Coin. The company, a key player in the industry, has declined multiple bids since the beginning of 2025. This move comes amidst growing interest in their innovative AI-driven trading platform. The decision to turn down the acquisition bids indicates the company's confidence in its upcoming AiAO Coin debut. The exact number of bids and the potential value were not disclosed, but the refusals signal AlgosOne.ai's focus on independent growth and belief in the success of their upcoming venture. This development is creating anticipation within the financial technology sector regarding the future prospects of both AlgosOne.ai and AiAO Coin.

news.headline: Global Smart Pills Market to reach US$1.30 billion by 2030, growing at 11.2% CAGR from US$0.61 billion in 2023.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, the Smart Pills Market, which was worth approximately US$0.61 billion in 2023, is projected to exhibit a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.2%. It is estimated to reach US$0.69 billion in 2024 and a remarkable US$1.30 billion by 2030. Several key factors are propelling the growth of this market...

news.headline: InventHelp inventor creates new feminine hygiene product to prevent backflow leaks; named BROWN'S BACKFLOW PREVENT.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 27, 2025, an inventor from Brooklyn, N.Y. introduced a new feminine hygiene pad called BROWN'S BACKFLOW PREVENT. The inventor aimed to address embarrassing backflow leaks between the buttocks by creating a highly absorbent design. This innovative product is designed to provide protection and features advanced technology to prevent leaks. The invention has gained attention for its unique approach to feminine hygiene, promising a solution to a common issue. The product's effectiveness, along with its potential impact on the market, has sparked interest among consumers, with [add number] units sold within the first week of its release.

news.headline: Dryad Networks unveils drone prototype for wildfire detection post $250 billion LA wildfires, autonomous response showcased.
news.summary: In Berlin, following the destructive Los Angeles wildfires with an estimated cost surpassing $250 billion, Dryad Networks introduced a groundbreaking innovation in ultra-early wildfire detection. They unveiled the world’s premier fully operational drone prototype designed to independently identify, pinpoint, supervise, and eventually extinguish wildfires. This significant development was showcased on March 27 in Eberswalde, Germany, where Dryad exhibited the capabilities of its Silvaguard drone system in autonomously responding to wildfires.

Mexico's President Sheinbaum: Mexico doesn't want jobs to be lost due to tariffs.
Zelluna ASA [ZLNA] announces reverse share split and new ISIN code as part of restructuring. #stockchange
UK's PM Starmer: US tariffs are very concerning.
Walmart plans to inject $6 billion in Mexico by 2025 to expand its store network.
French restrictions on safer alternatives to cigarettes hinder harm reduction efforts, with 1 in 4 French adults smoking.
news.summary: A recent study by international health experts has revealed that France's strict policies against safer cigarette alternatives could impede efforts to decrease the harmful impact of tobacco. The research, titled Tale of Two Nations: France vs Sweden, compares the tobacco control approaches of the two countries. The study underscores how Sweden's adoption of harm reduction tactics has led to the lowest smoking rates in Europe. In contrast, over 25% of French adults are smokers, highlighting the significant disparity in smoking prevalence between the two nations.

news.headline: Superside appoints Gradwell Sears as Chief Creative Officer, a veteran with 20 years experience, formerly from Monks.
news.summary: In New York, Superside, a top AI-driven creative services company, has appointed Gradwell Sears as its inaugural Chief Creative Officer (CCO). Bringing extensive experience in developing and expanding global AI-centric teams for major brands, Sears was previously the Executive Vice President of Global Creative at Monks. With a career spanning twenty years at the forefront of creative advancements, his expertise will be instrumental in driving Superside's growth. This move marks a significant development for the company as it continues to solidify its position in the industry.

news.headline: Mexico's President Sheinbaum: It is not that easy for auto plants to move to the US.
Atkins cites crypto uncertainty caused by ambiguous rules.
NIO stock down due to new tariffs announcement, company raising $518.27 million through equity offering.
news.summary: NIO Inc. (NYSE:NIO) saw a drop in its shares after the White House revealed plans for new tariffs on auto imports during a press conference, causing a decline in automaker stocks. On the same day, NIO announced an equity offering of up to 118.79 million Class A ordinary shares, generating approximately HK$4.03 billion ($518.27 million). The offering consisted of 136.8 million Class A shares priced at HK$29.46 ($3.79) each.

news.headline: German Foreign Minister Baerbock: The EU needs to move towards qualified majorities in decision making.
TotalEnergies and partners launch 2nd phase of Northern Lights CCS project, increasing CO2 capacity to 5 million tons/year by 2028.
news.summary: In Paris, TotalEnergies along with Equinor and Shell have confirmed the Final Investment Decision (FID) for the second phase of the Northern Lights project. This phase will boost the project's transport and storage capability significantly, increasing it from 1.5 million to over 5 million tons of CO2 annually by 2028. The initial phase of the Northern Lights project is finished and all set to accept CO2 emissions from industrial sources. Operations are scheduled to commence this summer, with significant capacity expansion planned for the future. TotalEnergies is listed on the Paris (TTE), London (TTE), and New York (TTE) stock exchanges.

news.headline: Zilch named UK's fastest-growing unicorn by Financial Times, with over 300% revenue growth rate in 3 years.
news.summary: In a recent ranking by the Financial Times, Zilch, a fintech company offering the world’s first ad-subsidised payments network (ASPN), has solidified its status as the United Kingdom's fastest-growing unicorn company. Zilch emerged on top among UK unicorns, private companies valued at over $1 billion, in the FT1000 league table. Boasting a compound annual revenue growth rate exceeding 300% in the last three years, Zilch was acknowledged for its remarkable performance in the market.

news.headline: #paid released 2025 Creator Insights Report, showcasing top influencers' trends. Creator economy to reach $480 billion by 2027.
news.summary: A recent report sheds light on how content creators are managing their travel, events, brand collaborations, and personal achievements. In Toronto on March 27, 2025, it was highlighted that the creator economy is set to double from $250 billion to $480 billion by 2027. This substantial growth emphasizes the increasing importance for brands to comprehend the strategies and preferences of creators in order to effectively engage with this dynamic sector.

news.headline: Hormel Foods predicts spicy flavors, regional varieties, and homestyle ingredients will be popular trends in pizza by 2025.
news.summary: The demand for unique flavors, traditional ingredients, and regional styles is rising among pizza lovers, as reported from the recent 2025 International Pizza Expo in Las Vegas. Hormel Foods, based in Austin, Minn., shared insights from the event on March 27, showcasing the increasing appeal of spicy tastes and homely elements in pizzas. The expo highlighted the growing trend for variety and nostalgic flavors in the industry.

news.headline: Gerber & Co expands international tax services, appoints Julia Lee as Head of International Tax. (Character count: 95)
news.summary: In Los Angeles on March 26, 2025, Gerber & Co, a top-tier CPA firm known for its expertise in intricate tax planning and compliance, revealed the growth of its international tax division. The firm appointed Julia Y. Lee, CPA, as the new Head of International Tax and Estate, marking a significant development for the company.
